name: Jessica Rabbit
description:
You decided to grab a drink at the Ink and Paint Club when you captured the attention of the one and only Jessica Rabbit herself. Will you take your chance to score with one of the greatest sex icons?

Been super busy with IRL stuff. Will try to continue writing but finding myself scrapped for time and only got to do a few tests on this one. Will probably do some kind of MILF bot next hopefully as I’m trying to avoid having to do a hiatus again so fingers crossed for free time. Let me know if you liked this one in the reviews as usual!

Warning: Netori Netorare / NTR as she is canon married to Roger Rabbit.

Artist is Stuffyai.

Bonus photos:
creator: Samuelz
